TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Kari_pnsltudan_rrudan_na_Cowcu-Cangi_ťĄíśóŹÁ•ěŤ©ĪÔľćŤĎęŤėÜ, title = Kari_pnsltudan_rrudan_na_Cowcu-Cangi_ťĄíśóŹÁ•ěŤ©ĪÔľćŤĎęŤėÜ, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kari_pnsltudan_rrudan_na_Cowcu-Cangi_ťĄíśóŹÁ•ěŤ©ĪÔľćŤĎęŤėÜ} }

S.FORM: Saadis na pkadi qcurux laqi na rseno ka tama,mquri tgelaq hii,mkmilo bobo tgelaq ka kesun daha qcurux You kii. Dmoi kadi kmadi ka tama,asi milo tuting truma ka qcurux . Prngayan na laqi na rseno ka pnkadi na qcurux ka tama. Mkmimah sino ka laqi na rseno ciida, mkala baro ka cangi, qmerac cangi ka laqi na rseno, asi lux skiya karac baro di. Kndalax pkadi qcurux meyah ka tama,ini sdiyan laqi na rseno.Slngelung ba ka tama,ini na slai ka iaqi na rseno. Bobo kawas kawas,asi lux peeyah karac baro mtuting hunac ka kingal rmabang paru hari tunux ka tumun btunux.Tg.daha qyqeya ge puyan,Tg.teru ge lmaqi na seediq, kika laqi na rseno wada mnkala karac baro kii mhiti meyah di. Rngagun na ka tama ndaan peyah Utux baro tmgesa ka laqi na rseno nii-Dmahur tunux boyak Taywan, Gaya lmaqi, Gaya mgseediq tncamac(mayasvi), qyqeya pccebu ma ooda, uyas dmahur daha ka ndaan.Bobo na psrading pssseli ma Dmahur ka Cowcu di. LalaciÁ§ĺ Voyuňče MuknanaÁöĄŚŹ£ŤŅį
S.PHON: saadis na pkadi q ¶u…ĺux laqi na …ĺs…ôno ka tama,mqu…ĺi tg…ôlaq ńßii,mkmilo bobo tg…ôlaq ka k…ôsun dańßa q ¶u…ĺux jou kii. dmoi kadi kmadi ka tama,asi milo tutiŇč t…ĺuma ka q ¶u…ĺux . p…ĺŇčajan na laqi na …ĺs…ôno ka pnkadi na q ¶u…ĺux ka tama. mkmimańß sino ka laqi na …ĺs…ôno ¶iida, mkala ba…ĺo ka ¶aŇči, qm…ô…ĺa ¶ ¶aŇči ka laqi na …ĺs…ôno, asi lux skija ka…ĺa ¶ ba…ĺo di. kndalax pkadi q ¶u…ĺux m…ôańß ka tama,ini sdijan laqi na …ĺs…ôno.slŇč…ôluŇč ba ka tama,ini na slai ka iaqi na …ĺs…ôno. bobo kawas kawas,asi lux p…ô…ôańß ka…ĺa ¶ ba…ĺo mtutiŇč ńßuna ¶ ka kiŇčal …ĺmabaŇč pa…ĺu ńßa…ĺi tunux ka tumun btunux.tg.dańßa qjq…ôa g…ô pujan,tg.t…ô…ĺu g…ô lmaqi na s…ô…ôdiq, kika laqi na …ĺs…ôno wada mnkala ka…ĺa ¶ ba…ĺo kii mńßiti m…ôańß di. …ĺŇčagun na ka tama ndaan p…ôańß utux ba…ĺo tmg…ôsa ka laqi na …ĺs…ôno nii-dmańßu…ĺ tunux bojak tajwan, gaja lmaqi, gaja mgs…ô…ôdiq tn ¶ama ¶(majas*i), qjq…ôa p ¶ ¶…ôbu ma ooda, ujas dmańßu…ĺ dańßa ka ndaan.bobo na ps…ĺadiŇč psss…ôli ma dmańßu…ĺ ka ¶ow ¶u di. lala ¶i* *oju*…ô muknana***
S.FORM: Saadis na pkadi qcurux laqi na rseno ka tama,mquri tgelaq hii,mkmilo bobo tgelaq ka kesun daha qcurux You kii. Dmoi kadi kmadi ka tama,asi milo tuting truma ka qcurux . Prngayan na laqi na rseno ka pnkadi na qcurux ka tama. Mkmimah sino ka laqi na rseno ciida, mkala baro ka cangi, qmerac cangi ka laqi na rseno, asi lux skiya karac baro di. Kndalax pkadi qcurux meyah ka tama,ini sdiyan laqi na rseno.Slngelung ba ka tama,ini na slai ka iaqi na rseno. Bobo kawas kawas,asi lux peeyah karac baro mtuting hunac ka kingal rmabang paru hari tunux ka tumun btunux.Tg.daha qyqeya ge puyan,Tg.teru ge lmaqi na seediq, kika laqi na rseno wada mnkala karac baro kii mhiti meyah di. Rngagun na ka tama ndaan peyah Utux baro tmgesa ka laqi na rseno nii-Dmahur tunux boyak Taywan, Gaya lmaqi, Gaya mgseediq tncamac(mayasvi), qyqeya pccebu ma ooda, uyas dmahur daha ka ndaan.Bobo na psrading pssseli ma Dmahur ka Cowcu di. LalaciÁ§ĺ Voyuňče MuknanaÁöĄŚŹ£ŤŅį
S.PHON: saadis na pkadi q ¶u…ĺux laqi na …ĺs…ôno ka tama,mqu…ĺi tg…ôlaq ńßii,mkmilo bobo tg…ôlaq ka k…ôsun dańßa q ¶u…ĺux jou kii. dmoi kadi kmadi ka tama,asi milo tutiŇč t…ĺuma ka q ¶u…ĺux . p…ĺŇčajan na laqi na …ĺs…ôno ka pnkadi na q ¶u…ĺux ka tama. mkmimańß sino ka laqi na …ĺs…ôno ¶iida, mkala ba…ĺo ka ¶aŇči, qm…ô…ĺa ¶ ¶aŇči ka laqi na …ĺs…ôno, asi lux skija ka…ĺa ¶ ba…ĺo di. kndalax pkadi q ¶u…ĺux m…ôańß ka tama,ini sdijan laqi na …ĺs…ôno.slŇč…ôluŇč ba ka tama,ini na slai ka iaqi na …ĺs…ôno. bobo kawas kawas,asi lux p…ô…ôańß ka…ĺa ¶ ba…ĺo mtutiŇč ńßuna ¶ ka kiŇčal …ĺmabaŇč pa…ĺu ńßa…ĺi tunux ka tumun btunux.tg.dańßa qjq…ôa g…ô pujan,tg.t…ô…ĺu g…ô lmaqi na s…ô…ôdiq, kika laqi na …ĺs…ôno wada mnkala ka…ĺa ¶ ba…ĺo kii mńßiti m…ôańß di. …ĺŇčagun na ka tama ndaan p…ôańß utux ba…ĺo tmg…ôsa ka laqi na …ĺs…ôno nii-dmańßu…ĺ tunux bojak tajwan, gaja lmaqi, gaja mgs…ô…ôdiq tn ¶ama ¶(majas*i), qjq…ôa p ¶ ¶…ôbu ma ooda, ujas dmańßu…ĺ dańßa ka ndaan.bobo na ps…ĺadiŇč psss…ôli ma dmańßu…ĺ ka ¶ow ¶u di. lala ¶i* *oju*…ô muknana***
